steps.title: Spot the defining claim about reception
steps.content: The opening statement sets the tone: “the reception...has been very good.” This positive framing is the decisive signal that tells us the blank must contain an action aligned with the positive reception and the major award.

steps.title: Match the action to the context
steps.content:
The influential voices (reviewers, booksellers, librarians) must have taken an action consistent with winning a major award. Recommended directly expresses this endorsement—to suggest and advocate for a book.

The other three options (attacked, overlooked, misunderstood) are all negative or dismissive, each contradicting the award-winning context.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
